spotlight_1.name: Quantified Simple Monthly Rotation
spotlight_1.thesis_one_liner: Quantified Simple Monthly Rotation tests whether systematic price rotation can capture persistent sector momentum better than passive market exposure.
spotlight_1.teaser_hook: Academically validated signal with live trading receipts

spotlight_2.name: High Yield Spread Regime
spotlight_2.thesis_one_liner: High Yield Spread Regime tests whether macro data can expose input-cost, demand, or regime pressure before sector ETFs fully react.
spotlight_2.teaser_hook: Alternative data experiment tracked live in public
